nodes.claim: BTC/USDT 1h shows 20-bar reversal (49% hit rate), enabling a contrarian strategy
nodes.rationale: Detected 48.6% directional persistence over 20-bar windows. If structural, a contrarian strategy following the 20-bar trend should profit.
nodes.falsification_criteria: Contrarian strategy based on 20-bar returns does not produce significant positive Sharpe (p > alpha)

nodes.claim: SOL/USDT exhibits negative drift in last 3 days of month (-0.235% per bar vs rest, n=252) — short EOM strategy
nodes.rationale: Institutional rebalancing at month-end forces position trimming on outperforming/volatile assets to maintain target allocations. Crypto's high volatility makes it a frequent target of these rebalancing flows. The effect is causally grounded in TradFi accounting cycles, not statistical accident.
nodes.falsification_criteria: Short-EOM strategy (last 3 days of month) does not produce significant returns vs always-flat baseline (p > alpha)

nodes.claim: Bearish on-chain divergence in BTC/USDT: price rising but on-chain volume declining signals speculative rally without real activity (20 events)
nodes.rationale: Rising price without corresponding on-chain activity means the rally is driven by derivatives/leverage, not actual BTC movement. These rallies are fragile — there's no real demand backing the price increase.
nodes.falsification_criteria: Short position on on-chain divergence with 20-bar hold does not produce significant returns (p > alpha)

nodes.claim: BTC/USDT reverts to 50-period mean after extreme deviations (|z| > 2.0) within 25 periods
nodes.rationale: Observed 93% reversion rate across 10012 extreme events. If structural, a mean-reversion strategy should capture this.
nodes.falsification_criteria: Buy-the-dip (z < -2) / sell-the-spike (z > 2) strategy does not produce significant positive returns (p > alpha)

nodes.claim: Extreme greed (FNG>75) during rally in ETH/USDT marks euphoria — selling and holding 20 bars captures reversal (46% reversal rate across 41 events)
nodes.rationale: Extreme greed during extended rally reflects overleveraged positioning. Marginal buyers exhausted, liquidation cascades become likely. Short exposure profits from the inevitable deleveraging.
nodes.falsification_criteria: Sell-at-greed strategy with 20-bar holding period does not produce significant negative returns for the asset (p > alpha)

nodes.claim: Bearish multi-source confluence in SOL/USDT: greed + distribution + rally marks structural top (67 events)
nodes.rationale: Three independent causal channels converge: (1) retail greed → overleveraged, (2) on-chain volume falling → real activity doesn't support the price, (3) price at recent highs → maximum euphoria. The rally is built on leverage and sentiment, not real demand. Liquidation cascade is the likely resolution.
nodes.falsification_criteria: Short position on multi-source confluence with 30-bar hold does not produce significant returns (p > alpha)

nodes.claim: Bullish on-chain divergence in SOL/USDT: price falling but on-chain volume rising signals accumulation by large holders (102 events)
nodes.rationale: Declining price + rising on-chain volume means real BTC is moving to new wallets despite negative sentiment. This pattern reflects informed accumulation — large holders buying from panicking retail. Price follows on-chain activity.
nodes.falsification_criteria: Long position on on-chain divergence with 20-bar hold does not produce significant returns (p > alpha)

nodes.claim: Miner capitulation recovery in BTC/USDT: hashrate recovering after >10% drop signals forced selling exhausted (40% win rate, 45 events)
nodes.rationale: When hashrate drops significantly, unprofitable miners shut down and must sell BTC reserves to cover fixed costs (facilities, loans). This creates selling pressure. When hashrate recovers, the forced selling is over — a structural price floor forms. Buy signal is recovery, not the drop.
nodes.falsification_criteria: Long position on hashrate recovery with 30-bar hold does not produce significant positive returns (p > alpha)

nodes.claim: Bullish multi-source confluence in SOL/USDT: fear + accumulation + drawdown marks structural buying opportunity (22 events)
nodes.rationale: Three independent causal channels converge: (1) retail sentiment extreme fear → capitulation selling exhausted, (2) on-chain volume rising → large holders accumulating despite fear, (3) price at recent lows → maximum pain. nodes.rationale: Three independent causal channels converge: (1) retail sentiment extreme fear → capitulation selling exhausted, (2) on-chain volume rising → large holders accumulating despite fear, (3) price at recent lows → maximum pain. Each source tells a different part of the same story. Together they identify moments where forced selling is exhausted and informed money is positioned.
nodes.falsification_criteria: Long position on multi-source confluence with 30-bar hold does not produce significant returns (p > alpha)

nodes.claim: Extreme greed (FNG>75) during rally in SOL/USDT marks euphoria — selling and holding 20 bars captures reversal (67% reversal rate across 49 events)
nodes.rationale: Extreme greed during extended rally reflects overleveraged positioning. Marginal buyers exhausted, liquidation cascades become likely. Short exposure profits from the inevitable deleveraging.
nodes.falsification_criteria: Sell-at-greed strategy with 20-bar holding period does not produce significant negative returns for the asset (p > alpha)
